output.recheckScope: Developer fix verification for FQA-001 only

fileReview.notes: editPost is correctly added as the second dependency. The full useEffect now reads: useEffect( () => { if ( meta.name ) { editPost( { title: meta.name } ); } }, [ meta.name, editPost ] );

build.notes: bun run build compiles without errors.

lint.notes: Zero lint errors or warnings in any TestimonialCPT file (TestimonialCPT.tsx, testimonial-cpt-panel.tsx, index.tsx). The 24 errors and 8 warnings reported by taktician_validate_all are all in unrelated pre-existing blocks: FullWidthMedia, MainWrapper, TestimonialsCarousel, Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, PostHero, Tabs. None are attributable to the TestimonialCPT block.

resolvedIssues.description: useEffect missing 'editPost' in dependency array — react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warning
resolvedIssues.resolution: Added editPost to the useEffect dependency array on line 50 of TestimonialCPT.tsx

output.overallVerdict: FQA-001 is resolved. TestimonialCPT block has no lint errors or warnings. Build, sync, and registration all pass. Block is clear for production readiness.
